source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 坚持开放共赢 驱动创新发展
topics.official_english: China Vows to Pursue Openness and Win-Win Cooperation to Drive Innovation-Driven Development
topics.why_hot: Official policy direction signals China's commitment to global cooperation and innovation, a key public-interest topic.
topics.share_angle: Explain how China's open-door policy and innovation drive impact global tech and trade.

topics.chinese_topic: 马龙许昕3比0横扫对手夺冠
topics.official_english: Ma Long and Xu Xin Win Table Tennis Doubles Title with 3-0 Sweep
topics.why_hot: Veteran table tennis stars dominate, sparking discussions about China's national team depth.
topics.share_angle: Highlight the duo's legacy and what it means for the future of Chinese table tennis.

topics.chinese_topic: 多队球衣已打折 国足球衣仍105美元
topics.official_english: World Cup Jerseys on Sale, but China National Team Jersey Still Priced at $105
topics.why_hot: Contrast between discounted jerseys of other teams and high price of Chinese team jersey sparks debate on value and performance.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the economics of sports merchandise and fan expectations.

topics.official_english: Three New Faces of China's New Growth Drivers
topics.why_hot: Explores emerging industries driving China's economy, relevant to tech and economic trends.
topics.share_angle: Break down the three sectors (e.g., AI, green energy, biotech) and their global impact.

topics.official_english: Heavy Rain Hits Shanghai, Causing Disruptions
topics.why_hot: Extreme weather event affecting millions, raising awareness about climate resilience.
topics.share_angle: Discuss urban flooding challenges and climate adaptation measures in megacities.

topics.chinese_topic: 一年超8万家面包店关停
topics.official_english: Over 80,000 Bakeries Closed in China in One Year
topics.why_hot: Signals economic pressure on small businesses and changing consumer habits.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the reasons behind the bakery closures and what it says about China's retail economy.

topics.chinese_topic: 马来西亚宣布驱逐所有以色列人
topics.official_english: Malaysia Announces Expulsion of All Israeli Nationals
topics.why_hot: Major diplomatic move with regional implications, generating international discussion.
topics.share_angle: Explain the context and potential consequences for Middle East and Southeast Asia relations.

topics.chinese_topic: 世界杯决赛观赛指南来了
topics.official_english: World Cup Final Viewing Guide Released
topics.why_hot: World Cup final anticipation, practical information for global audience.
